title: cyclotrichium longiflorum
intro: Cyclotrichium longiflorum, also known as the Long-flowered Persian Centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Caucasus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, Cyclotrichium longiflorum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
